title: Smoky Sweet Roasted Thai Paprika Ramen
description: A Thai-inspired twist on traditional ramen, featuring sweet smoked paprika and a rich pasta-water emulsion. This recipe is perfect for adventurous eaters who love bold flavors and textures.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a cazuela over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook until crispy, about 3 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the baby corn and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the Thai red curry paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sweet smoked paprika, palm sugar, fish sauce, and soy sauce. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the ramen noodles and stir to combine.
Gradually add the water, stirring constantly to create a rich pasta-water emulsion.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Garnish with chopped green onions and serve hot.
